title: Sour Gooey German Gruyere Stir-fry
description: This sour and gooey German Gruyere dish is perfect for a Mediterranean-friendly breakfast or light lunch featuring caramelized flavors and textures.

ingredients.name: 3 tbsp olive oil
ingredients.notes: heated to medium-high for cooking and caramelization

instructions: Preheat your stove to medium-high heat.
In a large skillet, add the olive oil and onion. Cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for an additional minute until fragrant.
Increase heat to high and stir in grated Gruyère cheese cubes. Let them melt first before adding any liquid to prevent burning.
Pour the lemon juice over the melted cheese gently and toss well to combine. If desired, add a splash of white wine vinegar now to enhance acidity without overpowering the dish's flavors.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Turn off heat immediately after stirring in the last ingredients to avoid overcooking and losing that gooey texture.
Serve hot as a side dish or atop toast for an elegant breakfast experience.
